TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Don_Barksdale, title = Don_Barksdale, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Don_Barksdale} }

S.FORM: == Don Barksdale == kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 3, Don Barksdale, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Barksdale htgan na ryax maki cyalipuniya awk'lang.Don Barksdale ga panga usuw qaya na squliq mtzyaw beh po'man.cyux maki lingay polihng pqwansan biru mqbaq biru. Barksdale ga mqbaq mari na p'unro maki koyeng. aring 1941 kawas tehok 1943 kawas cyux maki maling pqwasan biru mqwas ru myugi,tmasot mqwas ru myugi magal blaq balay na pqwasan biru pira. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Don Barksdale sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. NBA 1951 kawas hiya ru Baltimore Bullets 簽 biru qutux wagiq biru. Nathaniel Clifton Chuck Cooper ,Earl Lloyd ru Hank DeZonie ,1950 kawas tmwang lanmo lga,te qutux mzyu mari maki NBA na 非裔 Amerika squilq.suruw lga,Barksdale musa Boston Celtics ,sazing kawas,hiya Kakao 受傷 pincyogan nya mhngaw la. Later years masoq qnxan na mzyu mari lga,musa mise na renki cyux maki kosi nya ru gyahan sazing lahuy na mhngan maki Oakland . Olympic Games kingpay na tkura' mari' na mmlikuy sa kawas tay (1948) na Olympic Games. 28 kawas tmwang NBA. mhuqil 1993 kawas 3 byacing 8 ryax,magal nbu wal mhuqil la maki Oakland,California 69 kawas nya. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Don Barksdale == kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 3, Don Barksdale, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Barksdale htgan na ryax maki cyalipuniya awk'lang.Don Barksdale ga panga usuw qaya na squliq mtzyaw beh po'man.cyux maki lingay polihng pqwansan biru mqbaq biru. Barksdale ga mqbaq mari na p'unro maki koyeng. aring 1941 kawas tehok 1943 kawas cyux maki maling pqwasan biru mqwas ru myugi,tmasot mqwas ru myugi magal blaq balay na pqwasan biru pira. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Don Barksdale sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. NBA 1951 kawas hiya ru Baltimore Bullets 簽 biru qutux wagiq biru. Nathaniel Clifton Chuck Cooper ,Earl Lloyd ru Hank DeZonie ,1950 kawas tmwang lanmo lga,te qutux mzyu mari maki NBA na 非裔 Amerika squilq.suruw lga,Barksdale musa Boston Celtics ,sazing kawas,hiya Kakao 受傷 pincyogan nya mhngaw la. Later years masoq qnxan na mzyu mari lga,musa mise na renki cyux maki kosi nya ru gyahan sazing lahuy na mhngan maki Oakland . Olympic Games kingpay na tkura' mari' na mmlikuy sa kawas tay (1948) na Olympic Games. 28 kawas tmwang NBA. mhuqil 1993 kawas 3 byacing 8 ryax,magal nbu wal mhuqil la maki Oakland,California 69 kawas nya. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *on βarks~ɕ*ale == kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *on βarks~ɕ*ale, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βarks~ɕ*ale ħtɣan na rjax maki ʦ~ʨjalipunija awkʔlaŋ.*on βarks~ɕ*ale ɣa paŋa us~ɕuw qaja na s~ɕquliq mtzjaw βeħ poʔman.ʦ~ʨjux maki liŋaj poliħŋ pqwans~ɕan βiru mqβaq βiru. βarks~ɕ*ale ɣa mqβaq mari na pʔunro maki kojeŋ. ariŋ **** kawas~ɕ teħok **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨjux maki maliŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣi,tmas~ɕot mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣi maɣal βlaq βalaj na pqwas~ɕan βiru pira. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ rjax qnxan nqu *on βarks~ɕ*ale s~ɕa s~ɕenmuŋ pɣnawɣan mariʔ. nβa **** kawas~ɕ ħija ru βaltimore βullets~ɕ * βiru qutux waɣiq βiru. natħaniel ʦ~ʨli*ton ʦ~ʨħuʦ~ʨk ʦ~ʨooper ,earl lloj* ru ħank *ezonie ,**** kawas~ɕ tmwaŋ lanmo lɣa,te qutux mzju mari maki nβa na ** amerika s~ɕquilq.s~ɕuruw lɣa,βarks~ɕ*ale mus~ɕa βos~ɕton ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ ,s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ,ħija kakao ** pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja mħŋaw la. later jears~ɕ mas~ɕoq qnxan na mzju mari lɣa,mus~ɕa mis~ɕe na renki ʦ~ʨjux maki kos~ɕi nja ru ɣjaħan s~ɕaziŋ laħuj na mħŋan maki oaklan* . oljmpiʦ~ʨ ɣames~ɕ kiŋpaj na tkuraʔ mariʔ na mmlikuj s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj (****) na oljmpiʦ~ʨ ɣames~ɕ. ** kawas~ɕ tmwaŋ nβa. mħuqil **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,maɣal nβu wal mħuqil la maki oaklan*,ʦ~ʨali*ornia ** kawas~ɕ nja. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
